title: Order relative to authorizing the joint committee on Transportation to make an investigation and study of a certain current Senate document relative to prohibiting video recording or broadcasting while driving.

abstracts.abstract: Senate, March 16, 2026 -- The committee on Transportation, to whom was referred the petitions (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 2349) of Joanne M. Comerford for legislation to prohibit video recording or broadcasting while driving, report the accompanying Order  (Senate, No. 3007).

actions.description: Reported from the committee on Transportation
Order reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

related_entities.name: committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently
the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

actions.description: Discharged to the committee on Senate Rules
